evals.prompt: Create a Durable Object for a multiplayer game room that tracks player turns and game state.
evals.expected_output: DurableObject class with SQLite schema in constructor via blockConcurrencyWhile, RPC methods for game actions, and deterministic getByName routing per room.
assertions: Initializes SQLite schema in constructor with blockConcurrencyWhile
Uses RPC methods instead of fetch handler

evals.prompt: Review this Durable Object code for anti-patterns. It uses a single global DO for all users.
evals.expected_output: Identifies single-global-DO bottleneck anti-pattern, recommends per-user or per-room sharding, checks for in-memory-only state and missing storage persistence.
assertions: Flags single global DO as anti-pattern
Checks for blockConcurrencyWhile misuse on every request
Verifies state is persisted to storage not just memory

evals.prompt: Set up wrangler.jsonc for a new Durable Object with SQLite storage and add a migration tag.
evals.expected_output: wrangler.jsonc with durable_objects binding, new_sqlite_classes in migrations, and proper class_name matching the exported class.
